databrew.dataset.datetimeoptions.Format.Docs: Required option, that defines the datetime format used for a date parameter in the Amazon S3 path. Should use only supported datetime specifiers and separation characters, all litera a-z or A-Z character should be escaped with single quotes. E.g. "MM.dd.yyyy-'at'-HH:mm".

databrew.dataset.datetimeoptions.LocaleC.Docs: Optional value for a non-US locale code, needed for correct interpretation of some date formats.

databrew.dataset.datetimeoptions.Timezon.Docs: Optional value for a timezone offset of the datetime parameter value in the Amazon S3 path. Shouldn't be used if Format for this parameter includes timezone fields. If no offset specified, UTC is assumed.
